name: Crispix Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chocolate chips, milk chocolate, peanut butter, and margarine in a bowl.
2. Melt in the microwave for 2-3 minutes, stirring after 1 minute.
- Ensure the mixture is soft enough to be easily stirred and mixed together.
3. Pour half of the Crispix into a large bowl.
4. Pour half of the melted mixture over the Crispix and stir until combined.
5. Repeat with the remaining Crispix and mixture.
6. Sprinkle the powdered sugar evenly over the top.
7. Mix everything together, which will help break the Crispix into small bite-size pieces.
